meaning: n.偶像,崇拜物,幻象,[逻]谬论
examples: Screaming fans vied to get closer to their idol.
A great cheer went up from the crowd as they caught sight of their idol.
I have to watch my American Idol.
"Idol" had topped the Nielsen charts as America's most watched program for eight years running.
It even runs a website called InkPop, a sort of American Idol for teen writers.
